Scratch — 3 boats, 9 races, two discards (thresholds: 1 at 5 races, 2 at 9 races)

RRS A8.1: The series scoring instructions state how many races may be discarded. Threshold stepping: once 5 races are sailed, 1 discard applies; once 9 are sailed, 2 discards apply. Alice wins 7 races but takes DNCs in races 8 and 9. With 2 discards, she drops both penalties and nets just 7 points. This validates that the scoring engine applies 2 discards (not 1) at the 9-race threshold and correctly marks both of Alice's DNC races as discarded.

Scoring configuration: 1 discard from race 5, 2 discards from race 9. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Races 1–7: all three sail; Alice wins, Bob 2nd, Carol 3rd.
Races 8–9: Alice does not race (DNC); Bob wins, Carol 2nd.
    Alice absent — implicit DNC (N+1 = 4 pts for a 3-boat series)
    Alice absent again
Point totals (N+1 = 4):
  Alice: 1×7 + 4×2 = 15 total.  Drop both DNCs → net = 7.
  Bob:   2×7 + 1×2 = 16 total.  Drop two 2s (earliest first, races 1 & 2) → net = 12.
  Carol: 3×7 + 2×2 = 25 total.  Drop two 3s (races 1 & 2) → net = 19.

Alice leads in all scenarios (her 7 wins outweigh the 2 penalties even before discards).
The focus here is on confirming the threshold steps to 2 discards at 9 races and that
both of Alice's DNC races are marked as discarded.
Rank Sail Helm R1 R2 R3 R4 R5 R6 R7 R8 R9 Total Nett
1st 101 Alice 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 (4 DNC) (4 DNC) 15 7
2nd 202 Bob (2) (2) 2 2 2 2 2 1 1 16 12
3rd 303 Carol (3) (3) 3 3 3 3 3 2 2 25 19
